testcase.classname: Auth Middleware > verifyToken > in test mode
testcase.name: accepts valid test token from Authorization header

testcase.classname: Auth Middleware > verifyToken > in test mode
testcase.name: returns 401 when token lacks Bearer prefix (no space)

testcase.classname: Auth Middleware > verifyToken > in test mode
testcase.name: extracts token from any prefix format "prefix token"

testcase.classname: Auth Middleware > verifyToken > in test mode
testcase.name: rejects token not starting with test-token

testcase.classname: Auth Middleware > verifyToken > missing Authorization header
testcase.name: returns 401 when no Authorization header

testcase.classname: Auth Middleware > verifyToken > missing Authorization header
testcase.name: returns 401 when Authorization header is empty

testcase.classname: Auth Middleware > verifyToken > missing Authorization header
testcase.name: returns 401 when Authorization header has only Bearer

testcase.classname: Auth Middleware > verifyToken > test mode token validation
testcase.name: extracts user id from test token correctly

testcase.classname: Auth Middleware > verifyToken > test mode token validation
testcase.name: default role is student for test tokens

testcase.classname: Auth Middleware > requireRole > when user has required role
testcase.name: allows access for admin role

testcase.classname: Auth Middleware > requireRole > when user has required role
testcase.name: allows access for teacher role

testcase.classname: Auth Middleware > requireRole > when user has required role
testcase.name: allows access when user has one of multiple allowed roles

testcase.classname: Auth Middleware > requireRole > when user has required role
testcase.name: allows access when user has first role in list

testcase.classname: Auth Middleware > requireRole > when user has required role
testcase.name: allows access when user has last role in list

testcase.classname: Auth Middleware > requireRole > when user role does not match
testcase.name: returns 403 when user role does not match required role

testcase.classname: Auth Middleware > requireRole > when user role does not match
testcase.name: returns 403 when user role is not in allowed roles list

testcase.classname: Auth Middleware > requireRole > when user role does not match
testcase.name: returns 403 when user undefined role

testcase.classname: Auth Middleware > requireRole > when no user on request
testcase.name: returns 401 when req.user is undefined

testcase.classname: Auth Middleware > requireRole > when no user on request
testcase.name: returns 401 when req.user is null

testcase.classname: Auth Middleware > requireRole > when no user on request
testcase.name: returns 401 when requireRole is applied without verifyToken
verifies token then checks role in sequence
allows access with valid token and matching role
handles empty role array when no user
handles empty role array when user exists
handles user with empty role string
returns 401 when Authorization header is empty
returns 401 when Authorization header has only Bearer
returns 403 when token is not a test token

testcase.classname: /api/heatmap Endpoint > Authentication requirements > GET requests (if supported)
testcase.name: returns 401 when no Authorization header for GET
accepts POST with valid test token
accepts POST with token in different prefix format
creates record with correct user context
logs audit action on successful save
works with minimal test token format
accepts heatmap state with nested region data
returns 400 when JSON body is explicitly null
returns 400 when body is undefined (sending without data)
accepts empty object as valid (current behavior)
returns 201 status with recordId on success
response contains only recordId field on success
error response for invalid body has proper status code
error responses do not expose internal details
preserves timestamp in state if present
continues to work after a server error
encrypt() then decrypt() returns original data
round-trip works with deeply nested objects
encrypting same data twice produces different ciphertext
multiple encryptions of empty object produce unique ciphertexts
IVs are different even for consecutive encryptions
throws error when decrypting with wrong key
throws error when key is corrupted
throws error when key is too short
data encrypted with one key cannot be decrypted with another

testcase.classname: Encryption (AES-256-GCM) > edge cases for data types
testcase.name: handles empty object

testcase.classname: Encryption (AES-256-GCM) > edge cases for data types
testcase.name: handles null values in object

testcase.classname: Encryption (AES-256-GCM) > edge cases for data types
testcase.name: handles undefined values in object

testcase.classname: Encryption (AES-256-GCM) > edge cases for data types
testcase.name: handles unicode characters

testcase.classname: Encryption (AES-256-GCM) > edge cases for data types
testcase.name: handles special characters in JSON

testcase.classname: Encryption (AES-256-GCM) > edge cases for data types
testcase.name: handles boolean values

testcase.classname: Encryption (AES-256-GCM) > edge cases for data types
testcase.name: handles negative numbers

testcase.classname: Encryption (AES-256-GCM) > edge cases for data types
testcase.name: handles arrays of primitives

testcase.classname: Encryption (AES-256-GCM) > edge cases for data types
testcase.name: handles date objects (stored as strings)
handles large object with many fields
encrypted output can be stored and later decrypted

testcase.classname: Static file routes (Vercel serverless support) > whitelisted PNG / CSS / JS assets
testcase.name: GET /male-front.png returns 200 with image/png

testcase.classname: Static file routes (Vercel serverless support) > whitelisted PNG / CSS / JS assets
testcase.name: GET /male-back.png returns 200 with image/png

testcase.name: GET /female-front.png returns 200 with image/png

testcase.classname: Static file routes (Vercel serverless support) > whitelisted PNG / CSS / JS assets
testcase.name: GET /female-back.png returns 200 with image/png

testcase.classname: Static file routes (Vercel serverless support) > whitelisted PNG / CSS / JS assets
testcase.name: GET /reference-male.png returns 200 with image/png

testcase.name: GET /hospital-map.css returns 200 with text/css

testcase.classname: Static file routes (Vercel serverless support) > whitelisted PNG / CSS / JS assets
testcase.name: GET /hospital-map.js returns 200 with application/javascript

testcase.classname: Static file routes (Vercel serverless support) > whitelisted PNG / CSS / JS assets
testcase.name: GET /timeline.js returns 200 with application/javascript

testcase.classname: Static file routes (Vercel serverless support) > whitelisted /modules/*.js
testcase.name: GET /modules/body-heatmap.js returns 200 with JS content-type

testcase.classname: Static file routes (Vercel serverless support) > whitelisted /modules/*.js
testcase.name: GET /modules/body-heatmap-muscles.js returns 200 with JS content-type

testcase.classname: Static file routes (Vercel serverless support) > whitelisted /modules/*.js
testcase.name: GET /modules/heatmap-switcher.js returns 200 with JS content-type

testcase.classname: Static file routes (Vercel serverless support) > whitelisted /modules/*.js
testcase.name: GET /modules/heatmap-state.js returns 200 with JS content-type

testcase.classname: Static file routes (Vercel serverless support) > whitelisted /modules/*.js
testcase.name: GET /modules/demo-body-heatmap-simple.js returns 200 with JS content-type

testcase.classname: Static file routes (Vercel serverless support) > whitelisted /modules/*.js
testcase.name: GET /modules/nvidiaVisionClient.js returns 200 with JS content-type

testcase.classname: Static file routes (Vercel serverless support) > whitelisted /modules/*.js
testcase.name: GET /modules/translations.js returns 200 with JS content-type

testcase.classname: Static file routes (Vercel serverless support) > whitelisted /locales/*.json
testcase.name: GET /locales/am.json returns 200 with JSON content-type

testcase.classname: Static file routes (Vercel serverless support) > unknown / non-whitelisted files are rejected
testcase.name: GET /modules/secret.js returns 404

testcase.classname: Static file routes (Vercel serverless support) > unknown / non-whitelisted files are rejected
testcase.name: GET /modules/heatmap-state.js.bak returns 404

testcase.classname: Static file routes (Vercel serverless support) > unknown / non-whitelisted files are rejected
testcase.name: GET /locales/en.json returns 404

testcase.classname: Static file routes (Vercel serverless support) > unknown / non-whitelisted files are rejected
testcase.name: GET /locales/zz.json returns 404

testcase.classname: Static file routes (Vercel serverless support) > unknown / non-whitelisted files are rejected
testcase.name: GET /random.png returns 404

testcase.classname: Static file routes (Vercel serverless support) > unknown / non-whitelisted files are rejected
testcase.name: GET /malware.css returns 404

testcase.classname: Static file routes (Vercel serverless support) > path-traversal protection
testcase.name: GET /modules/../Server-v2.js does not leak project files

testcase.classname: Static file routes (Vercel serverless support) > path-traversal protection
testcase.name: GET /modules/../package.json does not leak project files

testcase.classname: Static file routes (Vercel serverless support) > path-traversal protection
testcase.name: GET /modules/.env does not leak project files

testcase.classname: Static file routes (Vercel serverless support) > path-traversal protection
testcase.name: GET /locales/../Server-v2.js does not leak project files

testcase.classname: Static file routes (Vercel serverless support) > path-traversal protection
testcase.name: GET /locales/.env does not leak project files

testcase.classname: Static file routes (Vercel serverless support) > path-traversal protection
testcase.name: GET /modules/heatmap-state.js/../Server-v2.js does not leak project files

testcase.classname: Static file routes (Vercel serverless support) > path-traversal protection
testcase.name: dotfiles at the project root are not served (e.g. /.env)

testcase.classname: Static file routes (Vercel serverless support) > API routes still work alongside static handler
testcase.name: GET /api/status returns 200
mounts auth routes exactly once (not duplicate routes)
mounts timeline route exactly once (not duplicate)
does not mount /auth with authRoutes more than once
does not mount /timeline twice with same middleware
mounts /auth with both apiLimiter and authRoutes
mounts /timeline with both apiLimiter and verifyToken
returns 400 for password less than 8 characters
returns 200 and token with valid credentials
POST /auth/refresh returns new access token with valid refresh cookie
does not contain hardcoded http://localhost URLs
does not hardcode port 3000 in API calls
returns 429 after exceeding rate limit on /auth/login
returns 429 after exceeding rate limit on /timeline
in test mode the URL points to local /auth/oauth-callback
falls back to req.headers.host when x-forwarded-host is missing
APP_BASE_URL wins over proxy headers (lets ops pin a public URL)
handles a comma-separated list in x-forwarded-proto (takes first value)
falls through to http when no protocol hint is present
serves an HTML bridge page that posts the session
returns 401 when test token is invalid
accepts a valid test token and sets the refresh cookie

testcase.classname: Google OAuth endpoints > Auth modal markup includes Google button
testcase.name: serves IIndex.html with the Google sign-in button
GET /api/profile returns 403 with non-test token format
GET /api/profile returns 401 with empty Authorization header

testcase.classname: User Profile API > GET /api/profile - Profile retrieval
testcase.name: returns full profile data when authenticated

testcase.classname: User Profile API > GET /api/profile - Profile retrieval
testcase.name: returns 404 when profile does not exist

testcase.classname: User Profile API > GET /api/profile - Profile retrieval
testcase.name: returns 500 when getProfile throws

testcase.classname: User Profile API > GET /api/profile - Profile retrieval
testcase.name: passes user ID from verified token to getProfile DAO

testcase.classname: User Profile API > GET /api/profile - Profile retrieval
testcase.name: getProfile called exactly once per request

testcase.classname: User Profile API > PUT /api/profile - Profile update
testcase.name: updates profile and returns updated data

testcase.classname: User Profile API > PUT /api/profile - Profile update
testcase.name: allows updating phone number

testcase.classname: User Profile API > PUT /api/profile - Profile update
testcase.name: allows updating date of birth

testcase.classname: User Profile API > PUT /api/profile - Profile update
testcase.name: allows updating gender

testcase.classname: User Profile API > PUT /api/profile - Profile update
testcase.name: allows updating blood type

testcase.classname: User Profile API > PUT /api/profile - Profile update
testcase.name: allows updating emergency contact name

testcase.classname: User Profile API > PUT /api/profile - Profile update
testcase.name: allows updating emergency contact phone

testcase.classname: User Profile API > PUT /api/profile - Profile update
testcase.name: allows updating address

testcase.classname: User Profile API > PUT /api/profile - Profile update
testcase.name: allows updating city

testcase.classname: User Profile API > PUT /api/profile - Profile update
testcase.name: allows updating language preference

testcase.classname: User Profile API > PUT /api/profile - Profile update
testcase.name: allows updating notification_enabled

testcase.classname: User Profile API > PUT /api/profile - Profile update
testcase.name: accepts multiple allowed fields in one request

testcase.classname: User Profile API > PUT /api/profile - Profile update
testcase.name: returns 400 when body is empty

testcase.classname: User Profile API > PUT /api/profile - Profile update
testcase.name: returns 400 when only disallowed fields are sent

testcase.classname: User Profile API > PUT /api/profile - Profile update
testcase.name: rejects id field when sent alone

testcase.classname: User Profile API > PUT /api/profile - Profile update
testcase.name: rejects role field when sent alone

testcase.classname: User Profile API > PUT /api/profile - Profile update
testcase.name: rejects created_at field when sent alone

testcase.classname: User Profile API > PUT /api/profile - Profile update
testcase.name: returns 500 when updateProfile throws

testcase.classname: User Profile API > PUT /api/profile - Profile update
testcase.name: returns 500 when getProfile after update throws

testcase.classname: User Profile API > PUT /api/profile - Profile update
testcase.name: does not send undefined values in the update payload

testcase.classname: User Profile API > PUT /api/profile - Profile update
testcase.name: calls updateProfile with user ID and update payload

testcase.classname: User Profile API > Security: Field allowlist enforcement
testcase.name: allows updating full_name

testcase.classname: User Profile API > Security: Field allowlist enforcement
testcase.name: allows updating phone

testcase.classname: User Profile API > Security: Field allowlist enforcement
testcase.name: allows updating date_of_birth

testcase.classname: User Profile API > Security: Field allowlist enforcement
testcase.name: allows updating gender

testcase.classname: User Profile API > Security: Field allowlist enforcement
testcase.name: allows updating blood_type

testcase.classname: User Profile API > Security: Field allowlist enforcement
testcase.name: allows updating emergency_contact_name

testcase.classname: User Profile API > Security: Field allowlist enforcement
testcase.name: allows updating emergency_contact_phone

testcase.classname: User Profile API > Security: Field allowlist enforcement
testcase.name: allows updating address

testcase.classname: User Profile API > Security: Field allowlist enforcement
testcase.name: allows updating city

testcase.classname: User Profile API > Security: Field allowlist enforcement
testcase.name: allows updating language_preference

testcase.classname: User Profile API > Security: Field allowlist enforcement
testcase.name: allows updating notification_enabled

testcase.classname: User Profile API > Security: Field allowlist enforcement
testcase.name: blocks id field from reaching the DAO

testcase.classname: User Profile API > Security: Field allowlist enforcement
testcase.name: blocks role field from reaching the DAO

testcase.classname: User Profile API > Security: Field allowlist enforcement
testcase.name: blocks is_admin field from reaching the DAO

testcase.classname: User Profile API > Security: Field allowlist enforcement
testcase.name: blocks created_at field from reaching the DAO

testcase.classname: User Profile API > Security: Field allowlist enforcement
testcase.name: blocks updated_at field from reaching the DAO

testcase.classname: User Profile API > Security: Field allowlist enforcement
testcase.name: blocks user_id field from reaching the DAO
new users get student role by default (test mode)
POST /auth/login returns token and sets refresh cookie
newly registered user has no profile until created (404)
profile can be created via PUT during onboarding
createProfile DAO is available for explicit profile creation
profile data persists across requests when updated
GET /api/profile route exists and handles auth
PUT /api/profile route exists and returns validation response
severity is one of: low, medium, high
confidence is a number between 0 and 100
alternatives is an array with condition objects
demoMode is true when no AI keys are configured
returns 200 even with empty symptoms (uses demo data)
handles prompt parameter in addition to symptoms
returns 429 when rate limit is exceeded
returns response with all major severity types
second identical request returns cached response
different symptoms produce different cache entries
different bodyArea produces different cache entries
cached response has same primary condition as original
cached response includes cached: true flag
handles request without image when other requests have images
returns 413 with friendly error when body exceeds 4MB limit
groq is checked before other models when API key is missing
demo mode is always available as final fallback
skin/rash symptoms map to Contact Dermatitis
headache symptoms map to Tension Headache
anxiety symptoms map to Anxiety Attack
default case maps to Viral Upper Respiratory Infection
all responses have consistent field types
facility objects have key required fields
facilities are returned for different severity levels
returns canonical schema even when AI omits core fields
